compiled_state.title: RED: Write behavioral tests for jira-credential-helper.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## TDD: This IS the RED test task

Create tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh

## Tests
1. test_detect_all_vars_set: Set JIRA_URL/USER/TOKEN in env, call helper, assert DETECTED contains all 3
2. test_detect_partial_vars: Set only JIRA_URL, assert DETECTED=JIRA_URL and MISSING includes JIRA_USER,JIRA_API_TOKEN
3. test_missing_vars_show_guidance: Unset all, assert output includes description text and API token URL
4. test_token_confirm_signal: Set JIRA_API_TOKEN, assert CONFIRM_BEFORE_COPY marker in output
5. test_jira_project_output: Call with --project=DIG, assert JIRA_PROJECT=DIG
6. test_no_env_vars: Clean env, assert all-missing output

## .test-index
Add: plugins/dso/scripts/jira-credential-helper.sh: tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh [test_detect_all_vars_set]

## Integration test exemption: gh API unavailable in CI. Documented in test header.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh
- [ ] At least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'jira-credential-helper.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
